notes: Summer day camp program — pricing is per weekly/session enrollment, not daily admission. 2026 rates: K-7th grade 8 weeks=$5,765, 2 weeks=$1,680; CIT (8th-9th) 8 weeks=$5,615, 2 weeks=$1,675; Preschool 5-day 8 weeks=$5,765 down to 2 weeks=$1,680. Extended care: before ($17/day), after ($20/day), combined ($30/day). Not a museum/attraction with per-person admission.
